title: Singapore MRT Alstom Metropolis C851E
description: Singapore MRT C851E for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The Alstom Metropolis C851E is a fully-automated electric multiple unit operating on the Singapore MRT network, with a 6-car overhead line variant for the SBS Transit North East Line and a 3-car third rail variant for the SMRT Trains Circle Line. The North East Line variant entered service in 2023 while the Circle Line variant is set to enter service in 2026.

This resource pack adds these trains to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod as retextures of the default A-Train.

**Minecraft Transit Railway** is required for this pack.

Contents:

- SMRT Trains C851E Circle Line (regular and mini variants)
- SBS Transit C851E North East Line (regular and mini variants)
